name: Mexican Topping
recipeIngredient: 1/4 cup shredded low-fat Monterey Jack cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the baked potatoes in half lengthwise, cutting almost to the base of each potato.
Mash the potatoes slightly with a fork, leaving them mostly intact (in skins).
2. Spoon an even amount of salsa over each potato half.
Top each with shredded cheese and chopped cilantro.
Makes 4 servings. Preparation time: About 15 minutes.
Per serving: Approximately 169 calories, 6 grams protein, 33 grams carbohydrates, 2 grams fat, 9% calories from fat, 4 milligrams cholesterol, 307 milligrams sodium, 4 grams fiber.
